category_sources: source_facts.description says it signs and verifies OCI artifacts and container images; official Notary Project documentation covers Notation tooling.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is notation; official repository is notaryproject/notation and Notary Project docs use Notation.
docs_sources: Official Notary Project site provides documentation for Notation; official GitHub README is the repository documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OCI artifact and container image signing; Notary Project documentation positions Notation as signing and verification tooling.
